title: Keep Your Hands Off Eizouken!
sourceNotes: Single-cour 12-episode TV anime (Science SARU, 2020); cumulative episodes equal broadcast episodes since there is only one season. Source manga by Sumito Ōwara is ongoing (10 tankōbon volumes, ~74 chapters as of 2026). The anime adapts volumes 1-3 (chapters 1-23) at roughly 2 chapters per episode; arc boundaries follow the three in-story film productions and are corroborated by matching chapter/episode titles (Ch 1 "The Greatest World!" = Ep 1; Ch 8 "Discovering an Iron Giant!" = Ep 5; Ch 15 "The Great Shibahama Festival" = Ep 8; Ch 22 "The Beginning of the War" / Ch 23 = Ep 12 "Shibahama UFO Wars!"). Volume-to-chapter ranges per the Eizouken fandom wiki. The 2020 live-action film/TV drama is a separate live-action continuity and is excluded.
